About

I build things and play music. Full Stack Engineer and Founder with deep expertise in Rust, IoT/OT cybersecurity, and modern web development. Experienced in leading teams, shipping production systems, and bridging technical and business needs.

Full Stack Engineer

My Founder Mode Software Services · Full-time
Mar 2025 – Present · 1 yr 4 mos · Germany · Hybrid

Fullstack development and community driven projects.
Infrastructure, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and additional skills.

Software Developer

Rhebo · Full-time
Oct 2021 – Jan 2025 · 3 yrs 4 mos · Germany

  • Developed Threat Detection Software for IoT and OT industries
  • Delivered improvements on memory and CPU utilization in resource-constrained IoT embedded systems through optimization of lightweight messaging protocols
  • Delivered Rust prototypes in anomaly detection, significantly improving threat visibility for industrial OT networks
  • Improved Rust based real-time protocol detection, serialization, and cross service notifications in low latency environments, resulting in more reliable synchronicity across distributed components
  • Hardened core product security by identifying and remediating critical vulnerabilities
  • Served as technical liaison with a multinational partner, supporting integration of the OT security platform into their IIoT environment
  • Introduced remote tooling and collaboration workflows for a distributed team, accelerating on-boarding and improving productivity across a team of developers
  • Contributed to notification systems for real-time OT network monitoring and anomaly detection

Skills: Representational State Transfer (REST), Network Security and +15 skills

Gridlock
Sep 2020 – Jul 2021 · 11 mos · Remote

Achievements:

  • Successful release of Gridlock’s security focused decentralized wallet

How:

  • Created strategic plans and company timelines
  • Engaged with business leaders and clients developing partnerships and leads

  • Introduced modern agile and lean development methodologies and best practices
  • Engaged with System Architect on creating module and system design
  • Led development on the core product and set task prioritization

  • Hiring and interviews
  • Product development
  • Task prioritization
  • SCRUM meetings

Projects

FestivalGrade – Festival Rating Website

Angular + PostgreSQL | March 2025 – May 2025

Fullstack festival rating platform with user reviews, Keycloak authentication, and content management features. Deployed on Hetzner VPS.

AI Detector – Open Source AI Email Detector

Rust | May 2025 – June 2025

Open-source email classification tool featuring a KNN detection engine, REST API backend, and Rust Hypertext server-side frontend. Containerized with Docker and deployed on Hetzner Linux infrastructure.
